name: jobtrack-ai
description: JobTrack AI monorepo — frontend, backend and development tooling

scripts.dev:local: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c blue,green "pnpm --dir frontend dev" "npm --prefix backend run dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --dir frontend build && npm --prefix backend run build
scripts.lint: pnpm --dir frontend lint && npm --prefix backend run lint
scripts.test: pnpm --dir frontend test && npm --prefix backend test
